title: VLANs, Trunks, STP, Aggregation, and MTU · Incident Case: Net Spanning Tree
summary: Segment a campus switch fabric for staff, voice, guest, management, and redundant uplinks. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net spanning tree increment in a verified switched campus configuration plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict root bridge selection, root and designated roles, alternate paths, states, convergence, and loop symptoms.
Explain switch virtual interfaces for management or Layer 3 gateways and the dependencies for an SVI to become operational.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Build Net Spanning Tree evidence
